title: IIM Calcutta is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Calcutta is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
